name: Pre-identified caller (persona vars seed name + policy)
notes: Demonstrates pre-context: the bound known-caller persona's vars (caller_name, policy_number, now) are seeded into the compiled prompt, as if the caller was authenticated in the Northwind app before transfer. (Most fnol context is captured live; this shows the pre-context mechanism — it matters more for outbound agents. now is also seeded for stable date references.)
user_turns: It's still seven seven four two one zero nine.
Backed into a pole in a parking lot this morning, just me, no police.
Rear bumper, but it drives fine.
Five five five one two one two, as soon as possible.
